phase_1_rationale: Candidate A provides cleaner and more maintainable refactoring overall, successfully deduplicating the options array generation in ToolConfirmationMessage and consolidating the MaxSizedBox wrapping logic in CodeColorizer.

phase_1_semantic_concerns.A: Defining REDIRECTION_WARNING_TIP_TEXT with formatCommand at the module scope could capture the wrong keybinding if shortcuts are user-customizable and evaluated after module load.
